creator: shige@kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
Update port: archivers/lha

This update is Lha version 1.14c => 1.14d.
Accroding to the ChangeLog document in Lha distribution, 
this updrade includes some bug fix on FreeBSD systems.

This update is an unified diff style patch.
Note that this patch includes japanese characters.

Thank you.

--- shige
